query: SELECT id, status, CAST(pipelineOutput AS CHAR) as po FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain LIKE '%lexisnexis%' AND status = 'failed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT id, status, CAST(pipelineOutput AS CHAR) as po FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain LIKE '%lexisnexis%' AND status = 'failed' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
